# Contributing

Thank you for your interest in contributing!

## How to contribute

1. **Issues**: Check existing issues before opening a new one. Report bugs and suggest features via GitHub Issues.
2. **Source code**: The source code lives in the [monorepo](https://github.com/coderbuzz/codex). Pull requests should be submitted there.
3. **Documentation**: Documentation is maintained as `DOCS.md` in the monorepo. Submit PRs to update docs there.
4. **Questions**: Use GitHub Discussions for questions.

## Code of Conduct

Be respectful and constructive. We aim to foster an inclusive community.
